mission: Build, create, connect — decentralized family mesh. This file is the machine-routable spine for p31ca.org; human narrative stays in root CLAUDE.md, P31 COGNITIVE PASSPORT — v5.md, and docs/. Version namespaces: P31 home docs/CANONICAL-NUMBERING.md; values: P31 home p31-constants.json. Source→sink alignment: P31 home p31-alignment.json (p31.alignment/1.0.0) and docs/P31-ALIGNMENT-SYSTEM.md (ephemeralization; verify: npm run verify:alignment).

phosphorus31.label: Public org / programs (phosphorus31.org)
phosphorus31.repoPath: separate tree — not governed by this file

andromedaCorporate.label: P31 Open Doc Suite + corporate one-pager (Andromeda repo, not a separate deploy)

homeVertical.label: P31 home — Soup, passport authoring, wcd33

glassBox.implementation: public/glass-box.html (mirrored from P31 home glass-box.html via npm run build:glass-box)
glassBox.label: P31 Glass Box — public live transparency terminal
glassBox.note: Schema p31.glassBox/0.1.0. Streams synthetic CLI playbacks (verify:*, launch:audit, reports:simulate, ecosystem:glass) + a real-time poll of the public reports/index.json. No tracking, no analytics, no operator secrets — only what we'd publish anyway. Short routes /glass and /glass-box in edgeRedirects (the /transparency short formerly aliased here now serves the formal annual transparency report at /transparency.html, PEER-2A). Not the operator UI (CWP-P31-UI-2026-01) which is at /ops and is gated.

demosPublic.implementation: public/demos/ (mirrored from P31 home demos/ via npm run build:demos)
demosPublic.label: P31 visual demos — mind-bending walkthroughs
demosPublic.note: Schema p31.demosIndex/0.1.0. Four self-contained visualizations (K₄ family mesh · alignment graph · Larmor pulse · glass box) + share-kit captions. Reads real data from p31-alignment.json + p31-constants.json. Short routes /visuals and /demos-public in edgeRedirects (the existing /demos points at demo-labs.html, a different product — see routes.demoLabs in this file).

canonicalDome.label: Sovereign Cockpit Dome (K₄ interactive)
canonicalDome.note: Primary CTA from hub home. Not the same product as observatory. Astro uses trailingSlash:'always'; bare /dome redirects to /dome/. Do not add _redirects that send /dome/ back to /dome.

observatory.label: OBSERVATORY — geodesic panel inspector
observatory.note: Hub registry appUrl must stay observatory.html.

k4market.label: K4 MARKET — tetrahedral price geometry (Three.js r160)
k4market.note: Main viz surface. Symbol search and Larmor ring live in tomography.html.

tomography.label: K4 TOMOGRAPHY — ARCHIVED 2026-05-03
tomography.note: Depth companion to k4market.html. Linked from k4market nav.

quantumDeck.label: QUANTUM DECK — fair shuffle demo (@p31/quantum-deck)
quantumDeck.note: Schema meta p31.quantumDeckPage/0.1.0. Browser core mirrored from packages/quantum-deck/src/deck.mjs via verify:quantum-deck. Short /deck in _redirects. crypto.getRandomValues — not destiny; no gambling UX.

quantumComposer.label: Quantum composer — K₄ Web Audio partials on the Larmor ladder
quantumComposer.note: Meta p31.quantumComposerPage/0.1.0. Four oscillators at Larmor/divisors; TRIM-rate interference via p31-quantum-grandfather-boot; verify:quantum-clock locks LARMOR_HZ to p31-constants.json. Short /composer. Pedagogy, not a physics engine.

planetaryOnboard.label: Planetary onboard — threshold (four doors, Gray Rock first paint)
planetaryOnboard.note: Static threshold: void + K₄ + tagline → understand | use | build | know. No welcome JSON fetch on this page; p31.welcomePackages still consumed by mesh-start.html. ?fast=1 skips timers; ?welcome=kid&?a=child opens Door 2 parent path. Passkey / pact on mesh-start + auth when invited.

welcomePackages.label: Welcome package definitions (onboard + mesh-start)
welcomePackages.note: Schema p31.welcomePackages/1.0.0. Drives copy, dial default, personalTetra dock overrides, mesh-start chips. Fetched by planetary-onboard.html and mesh-start.html.

superCentaurStarter.label: Super-Centaur starter pack — data, finance, structural sovereignty (human page)
superCentaurStarter.note: Tailwind CDN. Indexes CWP-P31-SC / MAP / ECO, mesh-bridge MESH table, onboarding links. Short /centaur and /super-centaur in _redirects. Pair with p31-super-centaur-pack.json.

superCentaurPack.label: Super-Centaur starter pack — machine manifest
superCentaurPack.note: Schema p31.superCentaurStarterPack/1.0.0. CWPs, mesh fleet URLs from CWP-30, MAP anchors, p31ca URLs, condensed checklist.

familySovereignPack.label: Family sovereign pack — printable household delivery
familySovereignPack.note: Lobby URLs, welcome-package entry points, edge anchors, troubleshooting. Canonical prose: P31 home docs/FAMILY-SOVEREIGN-PACK.md. Short /family-pack in _redirects. Pairs with p31-super-centaur-pack.json.

p31StyleCss.label: P31 canonical design tokens (CSS variables)

p31TailwindCdn.note: Generated with p31-style.css; static HTML loads after cdn.tailwindcss.com.

liveFleetDemo.label: Live fleet map — interactive demo page

fleetAgentsConsole.label: Fleet agents room — interactive directory + probes
fleetAgentsConsole.note: Short /agents in _redirects. Loads p31-fleet-entities.json; not the same as liveFleetDemo (raw liveFleet map) or fleet portal (URL roster from build:fleet-portal). Stub pages public/agent/<slug>/ canonical to this UI.

openSource.label: Open source — GitHub org and licenses

privacy.label: Privacy — data practices for hub static tools and edge Workers

publicSurfaceManifest.label: Public surface manifest — generic deliverable index
publicSurfaceManifest.note: Schema p31.publicSurface/1.0.0. Trust/legal URLs + key JSON endpoints + .well-known/security.txt path.

p31DeltaHiring.note: Vite static SPA: build in 04_SOFTWARE/p31-delta-hiring, run sync:p31ca, deploy with p31ca. Short /hiring in _redirects.

messagingHub.note: No shared chat bus. Short /messages and /comms in _redirects. Schema anchor p31.messagingHub/0.1.0. Manifest: p31-public-surface.json messagingHub.

auth.label: Authenticate — passkey verification page for returning mesh members
auth.note: No Three.js. Calls /api/passkey/auth-begin + auth-finish. Falls back gracefully when Worker zone route is not live. Canonical /auth (Pages).

passkeyApi.label: WebAuthn passkey API — register + auth (Worker)
passkeyApi.note: Not a static file. Production: zone route pattern p31ca.org/api/passkey/* → Worker p31-passkey (wrangler.toml env.production.routes). Endpoints: POST register-begin, register-finish, auth-begin, auth-finish. Hub static pages use same-origin relative paths (see mesh.passkeyApiBasePath in p31-constants.json). README: workers/passkey/README.md.

educationProgressApi.label: Education E3+ progress API — opaque subject key (Worker + D1)
educationProgressApi.note: GET /api/education/progress/:subject_id returns p31.educationProgress/0.1.0; first-touch inserts D1 education_progress row. Same Worker mount as passkey — production route p31ca.org/api/education/*. Static portal: public/education/portal/index.html.

nodeZeroHardwareApi.label: Node Zero Phase 4 — hardware pairing challenge, operator bind, telemetry v0 ack
nodeZeroHardwareApi.note: POST /api/hardware/challenge (KV hw_pair:+6-digit code), POST /api/hardware/pair (D1 hardware_pairings), POST /api/hardware/telemetry (shape-validated stub). HTTPS only — no MQTT or cloud IoT. Contract docs/NODE-ZERO-FIRMWARE-CONTRACT.md — production zone route p31ca.org/api/hardware/* → p31-passkey.

latticeOracle.label: Lattice Oracle — toy crystallomancy (CSPRNG, client-only)
latticeOracle.note: No network. Short URL /oracle via _redirects. Not medical, legal, or financial advice.

creatorEconomy.label: Creator Economy Contract — p31.creatorEconomy/1.0.0
creatorEconomy.note: CI-verified fee/split disclosure. Source: ground-truth/creator-economy.json. Verifier: scripts/verify-creator-economy.mjs. Runs in prebuild. Public endpoint: /creator-economy.json (CORS *). Version 1.0.0 constraints: platform fee = 0, creator share = 1.0, room access free.

geodesic.label: GEODESIC — 3D structure builder + K₄ live room
geodesic.note: Three.js r160. Static mode: 5-track progressive coach (BONDING-style tutor + tool unlocks, localStorage geodesic:progress:v1; skip=full unlock). ?room=<id> bypasses coach and enables K4 live: wss to GeodesicRoom DO (e.g. geodesic-room.trimtab-signal.workers.dev) for authoritative vertices (v0–v3) plus Phase-1 shared builder shapes (tet/oct/ico/cube) persisted in the DO, Maxwell rigidity summary on /state and in hello, 50-shape cap. Full spec: workspace docs/GEODESIC-CAMPAIGN.md when P31 home tree is present.

openDocSuite.label: P31 Open Doc Suite (git-native office pack + Forge bridge)
openDocSuite.note: Source tree: andromeda/docs/corporate. .docx via 04_SOFTWARE/p31-forge. Short path: /doc-suite (redirect).

devWorkbench.label: P31 Dev Workbench — ephemeral mesh reads + edge agent + orchestrator (read)
devWorkbench.note: Single static page; sessionStorage only; fetches p31-constants mesh URLs + p31-agent-hub + p31-orchestrator. No secrets. Short /dev in _redirects. AGENT_HUB_SECRET blocks browser chat; mesh GETs always work when CORS allows.

operatorShell.label: Operator shell — unified interactive frame (CWP-P31-UI-2026-01)
operatorShell.note: Phase A–C + v1.1.0 closure: hub / nav+banner → /ops/; glass summary; home npm run command-center actions. CWP v1.1.0. Trust: EDGE-SECURITY.md; POST shift on command-center only.

integrationsBridge.label: OSS smart home, wearables, and operator tool catalog (machine + doc links)
integrationsBridge.note: Data from p31-constants.json integrations; apply:constants → public/p31-integrations.json. No secrets; empty endpoint slots = disabled.

oqeIcosa.label: OQE Icosa — twenty-face forensic map
oqeIcosa.note: Static HTML; fetches p31-oqe-twenty.json. No CSPRNG. Verifier: scripts/verify-oqe-icosa.mjs. Short /d20 → d20-omnibus-icosa.html in _redirects (Fate 20 vs OQE icosa).

quantumClock.label: Quantum clock — Grandfather / Cuckoo explainer (pedagogy, not metrology)
quantumClock.note: Schema meta p31.quantumClockPage/0.1.0. Short /quantum-clock in _redirects. Hub registry card quantum-clock. See docs/PLAN-QUANTUM-CLOCK.md; verify:quantum-clock links tomography TRIM + grandfather boot to dome-constants.

p31LabsEducation.label: P31 Labs Education — curriculum E0–E2 + gated E3+ portal
p31LabsEducation.note: Discover, tracks, modules, labs; schemas p31.labsEducation/0.2.0, p31.labsEducationCatalog/0.2.0, p31.labsEducationCurriculum/0.2.0. verify:education in prebuild. E3+ stateful portal: public/education/portal/index.html (requires p31_subject_id; progress GET /api/education/progress/:id Worker+D1). Short /learn, /edu, /education in _redirects.

poetsLobby.label: Poets Room — void, daily quote, shelf, private local writing
poetsLobby.note: No crew APIs; quotes from public/poets-room-quotes.json; localStorage only for draft/photo. Clean URL /poets served from poets.html — no _redirects row /poets→poets.html (CF Pages 308 ping-pong). Hub registry id poets.

busBar.label: Bus bar — unified personalization + navigation contract
busBar.doctrine: Nine MVPs around one operator. K₄ topology applied to UX: every product binds to the same nervous system (CogPass + PHOS + theme engine + BaseLayout) instead of running parallel onboarding, parallel style, parallel state. The bus bar is the consolidation that lets PHOS speak with one voice across every surface.

stranger.label: Stranger
stranger.description: No CogPass loaded. Default state. Sees only the front door and the public products. PHOS uses warm register.

user.label: User
user.description: CogPass loaded with accessLevel=user (default). Personalized experience. Sees the lab and design system.

operator.label: Operator
operator.description: CogPass loaded with accessLevel=operator. Sees operations surfaces (ops, ede, buffer, glass-box). Self-attestation only — true operator-only systems still gate via Ed25519.

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.description: Front door. PHOS greets and offers the next step. Fast load, no jargon, ≤200 words first paint.

passport.label: Your card
passport.description: CogPass v1.1.0 generator + saved profile. Source: cognitive-passport/index.html (home root).

bonding.label: BONDING
bonding.description: Chemistry game bridging distance between parents and children. Separate origin (Vite+React+R3F). CogPass crosses via the postMessage iframe bridge at /cogpass-bridge.html (CWP-BUS4-COGPASS-BRIDGE-2026-05). The previous URL param bridge plan was rejected for privacy reasons; see the spec §4 strategy comparison.

lab.label: Lab
lab.description: Full product catalog. Currently the hub home page (/); rename pending route migration in WCD-PHOS-2026-01 BUS3.

research.label: Research
research.description: 22 open-access papers, filterable. Consolidation of Zenodo entries.

support.label: Support
support.description: Ko-fi + Stripe. 0% platform fees, accurate 501c3-pending language matching terms.html §5.

stylebook.label: Stylebook
stylebook.description: Design system reference. From the in-flight stylebook agent's work.

ops.label: Ops
ops.description: Operator dashboard. Wraps command-center + EPCP data. CWP-P31-UI-2026-01.

buffer.label: Buffer
buffer.description: Communications processing. ~85% complete; reads CogPass communication.preferredTone + avoidList on load.

glass-box.label: Glass box
glass-box.description: Public transparency dashboard. Visible to operator role in nav for one-click access; remains publicly reachable for everyone.

navByRole._comment: Slot IDs in the order they render in BaseLayout nav. Stranger sees 5; user sees 7; operator sees 11. WCD-PHOS-2026-01 BUS2 implements the rendering.

productSlots._comment: Maps registry product IDs (from registryAppUrlInvariants + scripts/hub/registry.mjs) to the bus bar slot that contains them. Seed list — extend as products are reviewed for bus bar membership. WCD-PHOS-2026-01 BUS3 completes the map.

crossOriginBridge.label: Cross-origin Cognitive Passport bridge
crossOriginBridge.doctrine: The bus bar promise — one CogPass, all surfaces — works inside p31ca.org because localStorage is shared at the same origin. It breaks at bonding.p31ca.org (and any future cross-origin P31 surface) because localStorage is origin-scoped. The bridge solves this without a server, without a cookie, and without copying the JSON across origins: a postMessage iframe loaded from p31ca.org reads the passport in its own origin and replies to allowlisted parents only. See docs/CWP-BUS4-COGPASS-BRIDGE-2026-05.md.
crossOriginBridge.singleRule: The bridge HTML imports normalize() from /lib/p31-cogpass-reader.mjs. It does NOT reimplement normalization. Locked by scripts/verify-cogpass-bridge.mjs.
crossOriginBridge.allowedOriginsPolicy: Hardcoded in this file AND in cogpass-bridge.html ALLOWED_ORIGINS Set. verify:cogpass-bridge enforces the two lists are identical — drift fails CI. New origins require: (1) operator approval logged in the commit message, (2) privacy policy update naming the partner, (3) verify:cogpass-bridge green. No runtime config; no wildcards.
crossOriginBridge.rolloutPhaseLabel: Phase 1 of 5: bridge HTML + schema + ground-truth + privacy disclosure shipped. No consumer wired yet (Phase 3). See spec §12 for phase gates.

constraints.maxProductsRationale: Nine calcium atoms per Posner molecule (Ca₉(PO₄)₆). The cage is complete at 9. A 10th MVP would break the symmetry and require an explicit cage-expansion CWP that re-derives the geometry. See docs/PHOS-VOICE-DRAFT.md §3.3.
constraints.constraintEnforcedAt: Architectural review. Future CI gate: verify:bus-bar (planned) audits scripts/hub/hub-app-ids.mjs against this constraint.

phos.absorbsThemeSwitcherRationale: PHOS becomes the single personalization affordance — greeting + hint + theme controls + 'create your context card' link. The theme engine stays the engine; PHOS is its face. Resolves the position collision (both wanted bottom-right). See docs/PHOS-VOICE-DRAFT.md §1 and andromeda/04_SOFTWARE/p31ca/public/lib/p31-theme-switcher.mjs (to be unified into PHOS guide component in WCD-PHOS-2026-01 C-1).

busBar.verify: npm run verify:bus-bar (planned) — checks that productSlots covers all registry IDs, navByRole references only declared slots, and product count ≤ constraints.maxProducts. Until that script lands, validate manually: every key in productSlots must exist in registryAppUrlInvariants OR be flagged as 'subdomain-only' (e.g. bonding); every value in productSlots must be a key in slots; every entry in navByRole must be a key in slots.
